data.title: Pete McLaughlin of Southern Glazer’s to transition to consulting role from EVP and GM of KY and OH starting Jan. 1, 2026.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Southern Glazer’s revealed that Pete McLaughlin, who currently serves as the Executive Vice President and General Manager overseeing Kentucky and Ohio operations, will be transitioning to a consulting position starting on January 1, 2026.

data.title: Global protein supplements market to grow at 3.61% CAGR from 2024-2030, with prominent players Amway, Abbott, Glanbia, Nestle.
data.description: Dublin - ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included "Protein Supplements Market Research Report 2025-2030" in their offerings. The market for protein supplements is anticipated to witness a growth at a CAGR of 3.61% from 2024 to 2030 globally. This market is transitioning from its conventional powder-focused image to incorporate diverse and innovative formats to meet changing consumer demands for convenience, diversity, and lifestyle alignment. A notable shift towards ready-to-drink (RTD) options is observed in this sector.

data.title: Overfuel, a website platform for dealerships, secures investment to boost AI innovation and growth with revenue up 400%.
data.description: In Indianapolis, Overfuel, a high-performance website platform aimed at boosting dealership sales, has received a strategic growth investment from Recurring Capital Partners, a key player in software company investments. This funding infusion will expedite AI-driven product advancements, facilitate strategic acquisitions, and enhance the leadership team to support expansion. Overfuel's success is evident with a remarkable revenue surge of over 400% in the past two years.

data.title: 4 winners announced in 2025 BNY UpPrize Social Innovation Challenge. D.A.D. App and Wombs win grand prize ($75,000), Parcel Health and DashStrom win grand prize ($125,000).
data.description: In Pittsburgh, the BNY UpPrize Social Innovation Challenge has crowned its winners from the eighth cycle of the competition. The early-stage track saw D.A.D. App (Doing it All Day) and Wombs taking the lead, receiving $75,000 as the grand prize and $50,000 as the second prize, respectively. Meanwhile, in the main category, Parcel Health and DashStrom emerged victorious, securing $125,000 as the grand prize and $75,000 as the second prize. This annual competition aims to foster entrepreneurship and drive solutions with enduring benefits for Southwestern Pennsylvania.

data.title: RingCentral to hold Product Briefing Day at NYSE on Nov 5, 2025. Event from 9:00 a.m. to 12:30 p.m. ET. Hosted by CEO and President.
data.description: RingCentral, Inc. (NYSE: RNG) will hold a Product Briefing Day at the New York Stock Exchange on Wednesday, November 5, 2025, from 9:00 a.m. to 12:30 p.m. ET. The event, aimed at analysts and investors, will focus on the future of AI communications. The briefing will be led by Vlad Shmunis, Founder, Chairman, and CEO, along with Kira Makagon, President and COO of the company, which is recognized globally for its AI-powered business communication solutions.

data.title: Dr. Maha Hussain receives the PCF Women in Science Lifetime Achievement Award from Prostate Cancer Foundation. Lecture on Oct 24.
data.description: In a recent announcement by the Prostate Cancer Foundation (PCF), Dr. Maha Hussain, MD, FACP, FASCO, has been awarded the inaugural PCF Women in Science Lifetime Achievement Award. Dr. Hussain, currently holding the Genevieve Teuton Professor of Medicine position at Northwestern University Feinberg School of Medicine and serving as the Deputy Director of the Robert H. Lurie Comprehensive Cancer Center of Northwestern University (Lurie Cancer Center), is set to receive the award. She will also deliver an honorary lecture on Friday, October 24.

data.title: Gravity acquires Cityspan to enhance financial management solutions for governments, expanding its product portfolio with grants management.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, Gravity, a rapidly growing company specializing in disclosure and budgeting automation in North America, has revealed the acquisition of Cityspan. Cityspan, a prominent provider of cloud-based grants management and performance measurement systems, has been procured to enhance Gravity's product offerings. The acquisition broadens Gravity's portfolio by integrating Cityspan's comprehensive grants lifecycle management with Gravity's existing disclosure, budgeting, and community engagement solutions. This move furthers Gravity's goal of creating a unified and interconnected platform.

data.title: Canada's data center colocation market to reach $2.11 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 7.33%. 111 operational  data centers in Canada as of Dec 2024, set to grow.
data.description: Recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, a report on the Canada Data Center Colocation Market forecasts a growth from $1.38 billion in 2024 to an estimated value of $2.11 billion by 2030, reflecting a CAGR of 7.33%. As of December 2024, Canada houses approximately 111 operational colocation data centers, a number expected to rise in the coming years with the increasing demand for data storage and management solutions.

data.title: Colombia's data center colocation market to reach $363 million by 2030 from $81 million in 2024, growing at 28.40% CAGR.
data.description: In Dublin, a report on Colombia's Data Center Colocation Market projects significant growth in the industry. The market is forecasted to increase from $81 million in 2024 to reach $363 million by 2030, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 28.40% during this period. Bogota remains the primary center for data center development in Colombia, experiencing rapid expansion with the establishment of advanced facilities and specialized cloud regions.

data.title: HeyGears launches Reflex 2 series 3D printers in China on Oct 24, 2025. Reflex 2 Pro and Reflex 2 models cater to production needs.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on October 24, 2025, HeyGears unveiled its latest product line, the Reflex 2 Series resin 3D printers. These cutting-edge printers, the Reflex 2 Pro and Reflex 2, have been created to meet the various production needs of both industry professionals and creative studios alike. With advanced features and capabilities, these printers are set to revolutionize the 3D printing landscape.

data.title: Amazon's AWS unit apologizes for outage affecting 1,000+ websites due to rare bug, centered in Virginia cluster.
data.description: Amazon.com Inc.'s cloud unit AWS has issued an apology and provided an explanation for a major outage that affected over 1,000 websites and services, including Snapchat, Disney+, Reddit, and Lloyds Bank. The outage was caused by a rare software bug in AWS's critical system in the Northern Virginia region, impacting the US-EAST-1 data center cluster. AWS acknowledged the significant impact on customers and attributed the issue to a faulty automation in its internal systems. The company expressed regret for the disruption and emphasized the importance of resolving the issue promptly. The outage served as a reminder of the vulnerability of large-scale cloud services to unforeseen technical failures.

data.title: Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Inc., USA plans to release Ropivacaine Hydrochloride Injection USP, with various mg/mL concentrations.
data.description: In Elmwood Park, New Jersey, on October 24, 2025, Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Inc., USA (Glenmark) has revealed plans for the release of Ropivacaine Hydrochloride Injection USP. This will include doses of 40 mg/20 mL (2mg/mL), 150 mg/30 mL (5 mg/mL), and 200 mg/20 mL (10 mg/mL) in Single-Dose Vials. Glenmark Pharmaceuticals is anticipating the launch of these new products.
